description_long: This is a vintage-style Pioneer record player with a rectangular wooden base and a metallic control panel on the right side. The turntable platter is centrally located and holds a black vinyl record with a blue label, while the tonearm is positioned over the record, ready for playback. The dust cover is a transparent, slightly frosted plastic lid, hinged at the back and currently open, allowing a clear view of the components inside. Four sturdy, rounded feet support the base, elevating the device slightly above the surface. The control panel features several metallic knobs and switches, providing tactile control for playback functions. The overall design combines wood, metal, and plastic elements, giving it a classic yet functional appearance suitable for home or urban environments.
description: A classic Pioneer record player with a wooden base, metallic control panel, transparent dust cover, and a vinyl record on the platter. The tonearm and control knobs are clearly visible, giving it a vintage yet functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the record player, including the platter, tonearm, control panel, and the open transparent dust cover.
description_view_1: Right-side angled view highlighting the metallic control panel, the open dust cover, and the tonearm's position over the record.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the transparent dust cover, with the internal components faintly visible through the frosted plastic.
description_view_3: Left-side angled view focusing on the wooden base, the platter with the record, and the open dust cover.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies the central portion of the record player. It appears to be made of metal with a matte black finish, supporting a vinyl record with a blue label. The platter has a smooth surface with subtle grooves for grip and stability.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and slender, extending from the right side of the player over the platter. It is medium in length, with visible joints at the base for pivoting and a black headshell at the end. The tonearm is currently positioned over the record, indicating readiness for playback.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its presence is implied at the end of the tonearm, likely attached to the headshell. It would be small, pointed, and metallic or ceramic in material.
attribute_control_knobs: Several control knobs and switches are present on the metallic control panel to the right of the platter. They are round, metallic, and silver in color, with varying sizes. Some have visible markings or labels, and there are also toggle switches and buttons for playback control.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of transparent, slightly frosted plastic. It is hinged at the back and currently open, allowing access to the platter and controls. The cover is rectangular and fits over the entire top of the record player, providing protection from dust when closed.
